News

Lecturer Gizem Türker Appointed as Committee Member at International AI Conference

Latest News

Dr Gizem TÜRKER, Head of the Artificial Intelligence Operator Programme at Doğuş University Vocational School, has been invited to join the Programme Call for Papers (CfP) Committee of the Diva 2026 – Dive into AI Conference and has become a committee member.

Read More

International Symposium on the Right to a Fair Trial and the Right to Defence

Latest News

Organised in collaboration with the Istanbul, Paris, Brussels and Berlin Bar Associations, the event will take place from 3–5 April As part of the “International Symposium on the Right to a Fair Trial and the Right to Defence”, our Dean of the Faculty of Law, Prof. Dr. M. Serhat SARISÖZEN, will chair the first session on the opening day of the symposium and will deliver significant remarks on the right to a fair trial.

Read More

Strategic Partnership Between Doğuş University and Bilişim Vadisi

News

A Strategic Cooperation Protocol was signed between Doğuş University and Bilişim Vadisi Teknopark Yönetici A.Ş., aiming to strengthen the collaboration between academia and the technology ecosystem. The protocol aims to increase university-industry interaction and joint studies.

Read More

Forensic Sciences Congress, in Collaboration with Marmara and Doğuş Universities, Held on February 25 with High Attendance

Aday

The Forensic Sciences Congress, organized in collaboration with Marmara University and Doğuş University with the contributions of student clubs, was successfully held on February 25, 2026. Realized with the contributions of academicians, the congress reflected the multidisciplinary structure of forensic sciences and student-oriented academic collaboration.

Read More

Report Launch on the Gig Economy by UNDP ICPSD and Doğuş University

Aday

The “Gig Economy Report,” prepared in collaboration between UNDP ICPSD and Doğuş University, was launched on February 26, 2026, at the Dudullu Campus. During the event, digital transformation, inclusive development, entrepreneurship, and policy recommendations were discussed from a multi-stakeholder perspective.

Read More

A New Step for Universal Exploration

Aday

Work is ongoing within the Universal Exploration and Communication Office established under Doğuş University. Aiming to contribute to space research, knowledge production, and the shared future of humanity, this initiative focuses on a wide scientific field ranging from robotic space technologies to the search for intelligent life.
With this initiative, shaped at the intersection of science, technology, and communication, we are expanding our scientific horizon together.

In the information age, being able to distinguish truth from falsehood is more important than ever. We are coming together to discuss conscious content consumption, combating misinformation, and correctly analyzing the effects of social media in the fast-moving agenda of the digital world.

Read More

Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban Served as an Invited Speaker at the 2nd ICEEDT Conference in Japan

News

Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban from our Department of Communication Sciences was an invited speaker at the 2nd International Conference on Education, Engineering and Digital Transformation (ICEEDT) held in Sapporo, Japan. He also presented a paper with Prof. Dr. Charlène Clonts on safety and well-being in alternative journalism in the digital age.

Read More

Championship Title for Semih Geylani in Turkey!

Aday

We congratulate our student Semih GEYLANİ, who became the champion in the triple jump category at the Indoor Athletics Turkey Championship organized by the Turkish University Sports Federation.

Read More
